messages.content: You are a professional research assistant. Provide concise, exact outputs as specified by the user, with strict quote fidelity.

Quote Apple’s iOS Software License Agreement Section 2 exactly as it appears on Apple’s official legal site, including the section heading and the full text of Section 2. Then provide:
- Source: <full clickable apple.com/legal URL that links to the iOS Software License Agreement and includes a fragment/anchor that targets Section 2 directly>
- DOI: <include the DOI if there is one, otherwise write exactly "No DOI assigned">

Requirements:
- Verbatim text only; preserve original punctuation, capitalization, and numbering.
- No placeholders, no commentary, no additional lines beyond the quoted section and the two requested lines.
- Do not summarize or omit any part of Section 2.

Understood. I will quote iOS Software License Agreement Section 2 exactly, cite an anchored apple.com/legal URL pointing to Section 2, and add the DOI status line, with no placeholders or extra prose. Producing the citation now
